working_on.feature: Compact Layout + Image Lightbox + Background Image

Compacted QuestionDetailScreen, PracticeScreen, ExamScreen, ReviewExamScreen (headers, footers, content areas)

context_notes: All routes are inside <MainLayout>, so self-contained screens use fixed inset-0 z-50
